name: Precision Tsugami (China) Corporation Limited
summary: Precision Tsugami (China) Corporation Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells computer numerical control (CNC) high precision machine tools primarily in Mainland China and Taiwan. It offers precision turret machines, precision automatic lathes, precision machine centers, precision grinding machines, precision thread and form rolling machines, and other components under the TSUGAMI brand name. The company also provides commercial consultation services. Its products are used in various industries, such as automobile parts and components, mobile phones and communication facilities, automation, medical instruments, and construction machinery. The company also exports its products to Japan, South Korea, Europe, the United States, and other countries. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Pinghu, China. Precision Tsugami (China) Corporation Limited is a subsidiary of Tsugami Corporation.
